text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To uncover the mystery behind the treasure map
left by a younger Matikanefukukitaru and her
sister, we visit her house—a shrine.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Nineteen, twenty! Where I'm standing is twenty
steps from the shrine's bell!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: There are ants here!
choice_data_list: Hmm... Looks like there's nothing noteworthy.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Uh... Wait a moment... I think there was
something we had to do here... Oh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without another word, she grabs a shovel and
quickly starts digging.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Look! A piece of paper with a code was buried
here!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Bravo! A code, you say? What a delightful turn of
events!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: "en b." Hm... All right, let's keep going!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The kagura hall... How nostalgic. My sister always
looked so pretty in the traditional dance clothing.
I'd play in front of the mirror trying to copy her
makeup.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I see, in that case... Haaah ha ha! Behold, I've
found it! Behind the mirror... "ox"!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Flower ornament... Um... Could it be the vase
over there?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
No, I'm thinking it's this hanging scroll. My sister
actually painted this one herself. That's why I
think behind it, there'll be—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It says, "wo." ...My sister was always so earnest,
able to do anything she set her mind to. I can only
imagine her smile as she hid these clues...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Look at all the carp! And your garden's
huuuge!
choice_data_list:
Doesn't look like there's anywhere to hide a
clue...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's probably another memory of my sister I need
to recall.

text_block_list.name: Young Fukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Look, Sister! There's something written on the
back of that big fish!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gasp! I remembered! Look for the biggest carp in the pond! There should be a snippet of the code written on its back!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
We already have "en b" from the bell and "ox"
from the kagura hall!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The hanging scroll of flowers gave us "wo," and
finally, from the shining back of that great carp,
we have "od."

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let me take it from here! Now if I just rearrange
the pieces...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's gotta be referring to this box, then! One,
two, three—heave!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh wow! Such a pretty kimono! Is this the
treasure?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This kimono... I remember now! That's right... this
is—

text_block_list.name: Young Fukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Awww! I'm so jealous of the kimono you got from
Mom! I wanna try it on!

text_block_list.name: Fukukitaru's Sister
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'd love to see you wear it someday too!

text_block_list.name: Fukukitaru's Sister
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know. I'll draw a treasure map just for you!
So when you get bigger, you can go on a search
for it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So this is where it was hidden. A treasure... just for
me.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Fuku, there's something on the ground! It
looks like a letter?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Dear Fuku, you're an adult now! Congratulations! I love how you're always so happy and full of energy! Thinking of you always!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, Sis!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I wanted you to see me... wearing this too.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. I've made up my mind!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
One day, I'm going to gain enough happiness so
I'll look great in this celebratory kimono!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And on some ultra-lucky, ultra-special occasion,
I'll wear it for myself and my sister!
...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel a presence somewhere behind me. A
tingling sensation, like the warmth of springtime
sun.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hey, once we're bigger, let's get photos taken
with everyone wearing kimonos!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that is a splendid idea! I'll dress up so
beautifully as to put even faeries to shame!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Taking photos together sounds great! Oh, um,
that's only if you're okay with it, Fukukitaru.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... I'll do my best, for her too!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, your sister didn't go to these lengths only
to see you cry. Show her your best smile!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! Ehehe, that's so silly! Come on,
you guys do it too!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ha... h-haaah ah ha!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you're right. I'll raise my voice beyond the
clouds!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Inhale... NYAAAH HA HA HA!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wiping the tears from her face,
Matikanefukukitaru laughs with all her heart as
she embraces life with the happiness and energy
her sister loved so much.
